name: SIM-MP-004-https-beacon
note: Optional C2 profile for the SIM-MP-004-B variant. Not used by the default SIM-MP-004 flow (which emulates hybrid cloud-pivot without implant). Enable with `docker compose --profile c2-variant up`.

listener.note: Self-signed is intentional — we want Cortex certificate-reputation BIOC to fire.

detection_notes: Pairs with NDR scenarios that expect repetitive HTTPS beacon patterns. Not required for the default MP-004 kill chain.
